mux_grid.original: alert flood warning issued for lawrence township checking sensor data now

mux_grid.encoded: sensor 7 reports no change currently at 0 point 8 feet sensor 8 is also stable at 1 point 2 feet

mux_grid.original: sensor 3 is now at 1 point 7 feet we need to activate the low lying area alert agent 2 please monitor sensor 3 closely

mux_grid.original: sensor 3 is at 2 point 3 feet initiating emergency response protocols agent 2 maintain constant monitoring of sensor 3

mux_grid.encoded: sensor 3 is now 2 point 8 feet requesting immediate evacuation assistance

mux_grid.original: confirming evacuation request dispatching emergency services to sensor 3s location

mux_grid.original: acknowledging backup support request coordinating with county emergency management

mux_grid.encoded: sensor 3 is at 4 point 1 feet requesting immediate shelter assistance

mux_grid.original: dispatching shelter teams to the affected area prioritizing sensor 3

mux_grid.encoded: sensor 3 is now 4 point 6 feet requesting medical support

mux_grid.encoded: sensor 3 is now 5 point 1 feet requesting heavy equipment for flood mitigation

huffman.original: zone 3 pump activated confirming sensor readings now

huffman.encoded: confirming 0 point 8 feet in zone 3 prepare for potential overflow

huffman.original: zone 3 is now at 1 point 2 feet initiating backup pump

huffman.original: zone 3 is now 1 point 8 feet requesting immediate assistance

huffman.original: evacuation confirmed for zone 1 and zone 3

huffman.encoded: confirming evacuation completion monitor remaining sensors for further issues
